patron_types: Darkeyes community leader protecting their own
Thaylen merchant guild protecting trade routes
objectives: Retrieve a gemheart from a chasmfiend
Escort a scholar to ancient Dawncity ruins
Protect a highstorm shelter during an attack
Scout enemy positions on the Shattered Plains
Deliver a diplomatic message across hostile territory
Investigate a Cult of the Lost (Unmade worshippers)
Secure an Oathgate for the war effort
Negotiate with a listener parshendi clan
complications: A highstorm changes the timeline -- shelter or die
The patron has a hidden agenda conflicting with the mission
A rival faction is pursuing the same objective
An Unmade's influence causes madness in the area
A trusted ally turns out to be a spy
The target location has been Soulcast into something else
An everstorm strikes during the operation
Fused are already present at the destination
The real objective is not what was described
A Radiant's bond is being tested by the mission's moral choices
rewards: Spheres (amount by tier: T1=50, T2=200, T3=1000, T4=5000 broams)
Promotion in military rank (darkeyes to tenner, lighteyes to higher dahn)
setting_twists: The quest target is in the Cognitive Realm (Shadesmar)
The patron is secretly one of the Fused
The location shifts during a highstorm
The Stormfather intervenes with a vision
A Shard's influence warps reality in the area
Parshendi and humans must cooperate to survive
The true enemy is an Unmade, not a mortal foe
